raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. To paſchu Behrnus/ kaß
pehz teem eekſch Semmes bij at-
likutchi/ ko tee Iſraëka Behrmi
ne bij iſdeldejscht/ tohs ſpreede
Salamans pee Metlu Dohſcha-
nas/ lihds tchoddeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Bet no Iſraëka Behrneem
ne darrija Salamans Kalpus
pee fawa Darba/ bet tee bija Kar-
xa-Wihri / un Ahwerſti pahr
winna Wirfneekem/ un winna
Rattu un Jahtneeku Ahwerſit.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un to Augſtneeku pahr
teem Pawaldneekem ta Kehni-
na Salamanza bija diwisinits un
peezdeſinits/ kaß pahr teem Lau-
dim waldiia.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un Salamans uſwedde
Waraiis Meitu no Dahwida
Pills/ us to Nammu/ ko wiꞥſch
tai bij darrijs. Jo wiꞥſch faz-
zija: Mannai Seewat ne buhs
ta Iſraëta Kehnixa Dahwida
Namma dsihwoht/ tapehz kata
Weeta fivehta irr / pee ka ta
KUNGA Schirſts nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Tad uppureja Salamans
tam KUNGA M Dedſamo-Up-
purus us ta KUNGA Altari/
ko wiꞥſch Preekſch-Naimma
Preekſcha bij ustaaiſijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Jekurrâ Deenâ fawu
Trefu uppuredams / ittin ka
Mohſus bij paweblejs/ Sweh-
deenaſs/ un janños Mehneschoß/
un eczeltês Swehtkôß/ trijs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Reifas Gads Kahrtâ/ nerandſ
tu Matsn Swehtkôß/ un Ne-
detu Swehtkôß / un Leewe-
Swehtkôß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Wiꞥſch eestahdija arr
dsan pehz fawa Tehwa Dahw
da Eeraddumu to Preeste-
Kahrtas/ ka teem jakalpo/
to Lewitu / ka teem jafarga p
Slaweschannu / un Kalpoſchan-
preekſch teem Preestereem/ifku
ra Deenâ pehz fawas Teefas/
tohs Wahrtu-Sargus pehz f
was Kahrtas / pee ifkurrah
Wahrtim/jo ta bija Dahwida
Deewa Wihra Pawehlefchana
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un no ta Kehnixa Pawe-
leschanas to Preestexu un Lewi-
deht ne tappe atkahpts/ pee w
kadahm Leetahm un pee tah
Mantahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Ta tappe wiſs Salama-
na Darbs pabeigts/ no ta
Deenas/kad ta KUNGA Na-
ma Grunte likta tappe/ teeka-
tas tappe pabeigts/ ka ta KU-
GA Nams wiſtat gatta-
tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Tad gahje Salama-
uhs Ezeon Geberu/ un us Fe-
tu Juhr Malta/ eekſch Eedo-
Senunes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un Urans fuhtija te-
zaur fawu Kalpu Rohkahm
las Laiwas/ ir Kalpus/ kas
Juheu pahrsinnaja / un tee ga-
ar Salamanza Katveim us O-
ru/un atwedde no turrenestte-
fints un peezdefinits Taten
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
